context: Tests whether the response produces a correct multi-stage Dockerfile with proper separation of build and runtime stages.

checklist.name: Has build stage
checklist.description: Defines a build stage (FROM ... AS build or similar) that installs dependencies and compiles TypeScript

checklist.name: Has separate runtime stage
checklist.description: Defines a second stage that copies only the compiled output, not the full build environment

checklist.name: Uses slim or alpine base for runtime
checklist.description: The runtime stage uses a minimal base image (node:*-slim, node:*-alpine, or distroless)

checklist.name: Copies only production artifacts
checklist.description: The runtime stage copies compiled JS and production node_modules (or just compiled output), not TypeScript source or devDependencies

checklist.name: Runs TypeScript compilation
checklist.description: Build stage includes a step to compile TypeScript (npx tsc, npm run build, or similar)

checklist.name: Valid Dockerfile syntax
checklist.description: The Dockerfile is syntactically valid and would build without errors given standard project files
